title: gitmap watch --json
description: Machine-readable shape emitted by `gitmap watch --json`. Top-level is a single snapshot object containing a repo array and an aggregate summary.

timestamp.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when the snapshot was taken.

path.description: Absolute filesystem path to the repository.

branch.description: Current checked-out branch. Empty when the repo is missing or unreachable.

status.description: Working-tree status. 'error' means the path no longer exists.

ahead.description: Number of local commits not yet pushed to the tracked remote branch.

behind.description: Number of remote commits not yet pulled.

total.description: Total number of repositories in the snapshot.

dirty.description: Count of repos with a non-clean working tree.

behind.description: Count of repos behind their tracked remote.

stash.description: Count of repos with at least one stash.
